criteria.name: Functionality
criteria.description: The breadth and depth of AI-powered utilities offered by the app, including but not limited to content creation, task automation, information retrieval, and personalization.

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: The ease of use, intuitiveness, and overall user satisfaction when interacting with the app.

criteria.name: Integration Capabilities
criteria.description: The ability of the app to seamlessly integrate with other platforms, services, and devices to enhance workflow and productivity.

criteria.name: AI Model and Technology
criteria.description: The sophistication, accuracy, and efficiency of the underlying AI models and technologies powering the app's features.

criteria.name: Customer Reviews and Ratings
criteria.description: Aggregated feedback and ratings from users regarding the app's performance, reliability, and value.
